title: Tragacantha balearica
intro: Tragacantha balearica, also known as the Sardinian goat's beard or hairy splet, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family. The health benefits of Tragacantha balearica are attributed to its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in the treatment of various conditions such as digestive issues and skin irritations. The bioactive constituents of this plant include alkaloids, flavonoids, and glycosides, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Tragacantha balearica is commonly used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote digestive health and reduce inflammation.
taxonomy: Tragacantha balearica is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It is a member of the subfamily Faboideae.
